/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Werror -Wpedantic -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-function -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_src.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_src.dir/src/Tests/test_CSVReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_src.dir/src/Tests/test_CSVWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_src.dir/src/Tests/test_BelZReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_src.dir/src/Tests/test_BelZWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_src.dir/src/Tests/test_CSVConvertor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_src.dir/src/Tests/test_BelZConvertor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_src.dir/src/Tests/test_BelZConvertorAdvanced.cpp.o -o test_src  libdata_structures.a libfile_tools.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 libdata_structures.a /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
